{{Quote|I survived the battle of the Celestial Wake for this?|Sarge, during the [[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|Battle of Garqi]]|<ref name="Orders" />}}
The '''battle of the Celestial Wake''' was a difficult battle that occurred during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]] participated in this battle. He would later complain about surviving it only to end up doing a ridiculous [[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|mission]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].<ref name="Orders" /> The [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] sergeant [[O'Niner/Legends|O'Niner]] also participated in this battle and survived it.<ref name="VGUB" />
